name: Gorilla 7B
license: Apache 2.0 (delta weights; base requires Meta LLaMA research license)
archDisplay: LLaMA-7B dense Transformer, retrieval-aware instruction fine-tune for API calls
note: Zero-shot beats GPT-4 by 20.4pp and ChatGPT by 10.75pp on APIBench across TorchHub/HuggingFace/TensorHub.

verificationNotes: CONFIRMED real: arXiv 2305.15334 (submitted 24 May 2023 — matches releaseDate exactly; authors Shishir G. Patil, Tianjun Zhang, Xin Wang, Joseph E. Gonzalez, UC Berkeley & Microsoft Research). HF repo gorilla-llm/gorilla-7b-hf-delta-v1 confirms Apache-2.0 delta weights over LLaMA-7B, matching license/paramsB. All three APIBench zero-shot/no-retriever scores (TorchHub 59.13, HuggingFace 71.68, TensorHub 83.79) CONFIRMED verbatim in the paper's Table 1. The paper text also literally states Gorilla is '20.43% better than GPT-4 and 10.75% better than ChatGPT' zero-shot — matches the note's 20.4pp/10.75pp. CORRECTED sourceUrl on all three result rows: the plain arxiv.org/abs/2305.15334 abstract page does not display the table/numbers (confirmed by direct fetch), so pointed instead to the full-text render at ar5iv.labs.arxiv.org/html/2305.15334 where the figures are literally visible.
